scripts.test:profile:offline: npx concurrently -k --names "system,deploy,frontend-offline,backend-offline" "cd system-tests && npm test" "cd deploy/tests && npm test" "cd frontend && npm run test && npm run test:ui:mock" "cd backend && php artisan test && php artisan test --configuration=phpunit.realdb.xml"
scripts.test:profile:installation-e2e: npx concurrently -k --names "system,deploy,frontend-unit,frontend-api-online,frontend-e2e-online,backend,backend-realdb" "cd system-tests && npm test" "cd deploy/tests && npm test" "cd frontend && npm run test" "cd frontend && npm run test:api:online" "cd frontend && npm run test:e2e" "cd backend && php artisan test" "cd backend && php artisan test --configuration=phpunit.realdb.xml"
